name: Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt into a small bowl.
2. Cream butter and sugar together in a large bowl until smooth.
3. Beat in eggs one at a time until well combined.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture to the butter mixture, stirring until just blended.
5. Stir in lemon peel, vanilla extract, almond extract, pine nuts, and anise seed until mixed.
6. Cover dough and refrigerate for about 2 hours.
7. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
8. Butter and flour two baking sheets.
9. Divide dough into four equal pieces.
10. Place each piece on a greased sheet and roll into a 1-1/2 inch thick log.
11. Arrange 2 logs per sheet, about 4 inches apart.
12. Bake for about 18 minutes or until lightly browned on top.
13. Cool slightly on the sheets.
14. Transfer logs to a cutting board.
15. Cut crosswise into 1/2 inch thick slices.
16. Place cut side down onto the baking sheets.
17. Bake an additional 10 minutes.
18. Remove from oven and let cool completely on a wire rack.
